name: No.1 Golf Lounge
about: No.1 Golf Lounge is a premium golf simulator venue offering focused practice and realistic course play. The facility features 11 Golfzon GDR simulators designed for both single-player practice and recreational play, providing accurate ball data for skill development. The venue operates with extended hours, staying open until 12 AM on weekdays and 2 AM on weekends, and includes a full bar and kitchen service for guests.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end Golfzon GDR simulators for accurate ball tracking and realistic play
Full bar and kitchen service available during play
Extended hours including late night options on weekends
Private room vouchers included with membership tiers
Accurate ball data to support skill development and performance improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen serving quality food for golfers during play
Full service bar with premium top shelf liquor and handcrafted cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: 11 simulators designed for focused practice and realistic course play

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary equipment, including clubs, for use during your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar on-site, so outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically takes about 1-2 hours depending on simulator usage and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific kid-friendly amenities are mentioned, making it more suitable for adults and serious practice.
